description: A flight has been delayed, and a crew scheduler must check if the delay will cause the flight crew to exceed their maximum duty day limits.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original and new estimated departure and arrival times for the flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the length of the delay.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the crew's new total duty period based on the delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the new duty time.

nodes.task_description: Compare the new duty period to the legal limits. If it exceeds the limit, find a replacement crew.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the crew will exceed their legal duty time and initiates a search for a reserve crew.
